description: Release-candidate end-to-end data-correctness / user-journey smoke: against the real local stack (Hardhat + IPFS + Ponder indexer), the canonical journey Playwright projects write on-chain via the SDK, wait for the indexer, and assert the rendered UI reads the value back. Proves the whole on-chain → indexed row → GraphQL → rendered UI round-trip, not just that source looks completable. Guarded because Playwright global setup restarts/clears local E2E stack state.

data.label: canonical user-journey round-trip Playwright smoke
data.mutatesState: Requires COMMONALITY_VERIFIER_ALLOW_E2E_STACK=1. The UI Playwright global setup may clean Hardhat/Ponder E2E state and start Docker services to drive the journeys.
